components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The main action button for starting sprints.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #2563eb; color: #ffffff; padding: 10px 24px; font-weight: 600; border: none; border-radius: 12px; font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #1d4ed8; }

components.name: Minimal Card
components.description: A clean container for dashboard modules.
components.css: .ds-card-minimal { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 12px; padding: 24px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05); } .ds-card-minimal h3 { font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif; margin: 0 0 8px 0; } .ds-card-minimal p { font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; margin: 0; color: #64748b; }

narrative.overview: StudyProx is built on the philosophy of Restrained Utilitarianism. It rejects overstimulating clichés in favor of absolute clarity and functional whitespace.

rules.name: The Rare Accent Rule
rules.body: The primary accent is used on ≤10% of any given screen.

rules.name: The Response Shadow Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest; shadows appear only as a response to state.

dos: Do use slate-200 for structural boundaries
donts: Don't use dark mode by default
